data.title: NTPC Clears Rs 9,000 Crore Push Into Battery Storage and Meja Thermal Expansion
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

NTPC Limited ( (IN:NTPC) ) has shared an announcement.

NTPC’s board has approved an investment of Rs 5,821.90 crore to develop a 4.70 GWh Battery Energy Storage System, underscoring the company’s pivot toward large-scale storage solutions to enhance grid stability and support renewable integration. In parallel, the board cleared an additional equity infusion of Rs 3,173.67 crore into joint venture Meja Urja Nigam Private Limited to fund the 2,400 MW Meja Super Thermal Power Project Stage-II, keeping the 50:50 ownership with UPRVUNL intact and reinforcing NTPC’s capacity expansion strategy in conventional power. The cash-funded commitments, expected to be executed through a rights issue in MUNPL by 2029-30, signal continued capital allocation to both thermal and storage assets, with implications for NTPC’s long-term generation mix and regional power supply in Uttar Pradesh.

More about NTPC Limited

NTPC Limited is India’s largest power generation company, operating across thermal and renewable energy segments with a growing focus on cleaner technologies. Through joint ventures such as Meja Urja Nigam Private Limited in Uttar Pradesh, NTPC is expanding its generation portfolio while also investing in grid-scale battery storage to support energy transition and grid reliability.

Average Trading Volume: 798,432

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: 3645B INR

Carnival Corporation continues to face the comprehensive set of risks disclosed in its most recent Form 10-K, with no material changes identified since that filing. data.title: Blast Resources Raises $1.06 Million to Advance Wales Lake Exploration
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Blast Resources Inc. ( (TSE:BLST) ) has shared an update.

Blast Resources Inc. has closed an upsized non-brokered private placement, issuing 4,240,000 units at $0.25 per unit for gross proceeds of $1.06 million, each unit consisting of one common share and one warrant exercisable at $0.35 until March 26, 2028. The financing, whose securities carry a four-month hold, strengthens the company’s balance sheet and is earmarked for exploration at the Wales Lake project in Saskatchewan, as well as operational needs, working capital and general corporate purposes, underscoring Blast’s commitment to advancing its Athabasca Basin-adjacent assets.

Each warrant includes an acceleration feature that allows Blast to shorten the warrant term if its share price trades at or above $0.50 for 10 consecutive days, potentially pulling forward additional capital if market conditions improve. The structure of the financing, coupled with its targeted use of proceeds, positions the company to intensify exploration activities in a strategically important uranium district and may enhance its visibility and leverage within the junior mining and uranium exploration space.

More about Blast Resources Inc.

Blast Resources Inc. is a Vancouver-based mineral exploration company listed on the CSE, FSE and OTCQB. The company holds several claims and an option on additional claims at a uranium-focused exploration project near Highway 955 south of Wales Lake, on the southwest margin of Saskatchewan’s Athabasca Basin, a region known for significant uranium deposits.

Average Trading Volume: 3,987

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$11.38M

Learn more about BLST stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Goldrea Resources Plans $600,000 Private Placement to Fund Golden Triangle Exploration
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Goldrea Resources ( (TSE:GOR) ) has shared an announcement.

Goldrea Resources has launched a non-brokered private placement of up to $600,000, offering a mix of flow-through and conventional units priced at $0.044 and $0.03 respectively, each with share purchase warrants exercisable at $0.06 for two years. The proceeds will fund exploration programs on its Golden Triangle property and cover general administrative expenses, with all securities subject to a four-month hold and potential finder’s fees.

The company has also commissioned an NI 43-101 compliant technical report on its extensive Golden Triangle holdings, intended to guide work programs over the next two field seasons and prioritize targets across the 8,500-hectare land package. Management says the planned active exploration season and structured roadmap underscore Goldrea’s growth ambitions and aim to crystallize asset value, reinforcing its strategic position in one of Canada’s most competitive mining regions.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:GOR) stock is a Sell with a C$0.03 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Goldrea Resources stock, see the TSE:GOR Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GOR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GOR is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (no revenue, recurring losses, and ongoing cash burn), despite the benefit of zero debt. Technicals are mixed/neutral with limited momentum, and valuation signals are constrained by a negative P/E and no dividend yield data.

To see Spark’s full report on GOR stock, click here.

More about Goldrea Resources

Goldrea Resources Corp. is a Canadian mineral exploration company listed on the CSE, Frankfurt and OTC markets, focused on advancing its gold and related metal assets. Its flagship holdings are in British Columbia’s Golden Triangle, where the company controls roughly 8,500 hectares of claims, including ground adjacent to Seabridge’s Snip North property, positioning it within a prominent mining district.

data.title: Coal India Announces Cessation of Four Independent Directors on Tenure Completion
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Coal India Ltd. ( (IN:COALINDIA) ).

Coal India Limited has announced that four independent directors, CA Kamesh Kant Acharya, Punambhai Kalabhai Makwana, Bhojarajan Rajeshchander and Mamta Palariya, have completed their terms and ceased to be independent directors with effect from 28 March 2026. The company notified stock exchanges in line with SEBI disclosure requirements, signalling a scheduled board reshuffle that could precede new independent appointments and modestly alter its corporate governance dynamics.

The changes arise solely from the completion of tenures rather than resignations or removals, indicating a routine governance transition rather than any apparent dispute. Investors and other stakeholders will now watch for subsequent appointments to assess how the refreshed board composition might influence oversight of strategy, regulatory compliance and long-term policy at the Maharatna miner.

More about Coal India Ltd.

Coal India Limited is a state-owned coal mining company and one of the largest coal producers globally, operating under Maharatna status in India. Headquartered in Kolkata, the company focuses on the exploration, production and sale of coal, supplying a significant share of the country’s fuel needs for power generation and industrial use.

Average Trading Volume: 814,299

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: 2734.7B INR

data.title: McLaren Resources Raises $662,500 to Advance Timmins Gold Exploration
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

McLaren Resources ( (TSE:MCL) ) has shared an update.

McLaren Resources Inc., a gold exploration company operating in the Timmins Gold Region of Northeastern Ontario, owns the past-producing Blue Quartz Gold Mine and the McCool and Kerrs properties near the prolific Destor-Porcupine Deformation Zone. These assets position the company in a historically productive gold camp within the Abitibi Greenstone Belt, a key area for Canadian gold mining activity.

The company has completed the final closing of a non-brokered private placement, raising total gross proceeds of $662,500 through the issuance of 13,250,000 common share units at $0.05 per unit, each with a two-year warrant exercisable at $0.10. The funds will be used for general working capital and exploration on its Timmins-region properties, supporting ongoing field programs and potentially advancing project development for shareholders and stakeholders in the region.

Spark’s Take on MCL Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, MCL is a Underperform.

McLaren Resources is significantly impacted by financial struggles, with no revenue generation and negative equity severely limiting its financial performance. Despite some positive technical indicators, the stock’s high P/E ratio due to lack of profitability and absence of dividends reduce its appeal. These financial weaknesses are the primary factors leading to the low overall score.

To see Spark’s full report on MCL stock, click here.

More about McLaren Resources

McLaren Resources Inc. is a Canadian mineral exploration company focused on gold projects in the Timmins Gold Region of Northeastern Ontario. The company holds a 100% interest in the past-producing Blue Quartz Gold Mine, as well as the McCool and Kerrs gold properties, all situated near the Destor-Porcupine Deformation Zone within the Abitibi Greenstone Belt.

data.title: International Metals Mining Set to Resume Trading and Restructure Debt
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

International Metals Mining ( (TSE:IMM) ) has provided an announcement.

International Metals Mining said it has been advised by the TSX Venture Exchange that trading of its common shares will recommence soon, marking a key step toward restoring liquidity for shareholders. The company plans to address its approximately $800,000 working capital deficit through additional shares-for-debt agreements and a private placement to be detailed once trading resumes.

These measures underscore management’s effort to stabilize the balance sheet and secure funding for ongoing exploration of its copper-gold porphyry asset in Peru. The anticipated return to trading could improve market visibility and access to capital, supporting the company’s positioning in the battery metals space amid continued investor interest in critical mineral supply.

More about International Metals Mining

International Metals Mining Corp. is a Canadian mineral exploration and development company focused on battery metals and related mineral assets. Its primary project is a 100%-owned copper-gold porphyry property in Peru, positioning the firm within the growing market for metals used in electrification and energy storage.

Average Trading Volume: 9,446

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: C$2.7M

data.title: CopAur Minerals to Highlight Kinsley Mountain Progress and Boost IR Efforts
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from CopAur Minerals ( (TSE:CPAU) ).

CopAur Minerals will deliver a live, 10-minute online presentation at the Emerging Growth Conference on April 2, 2026, providing investors and analysts with an update on recent developments at its Kinsley Mountain Gold Project. The presentation, hosted by CEO Andrew Neale, will be accessible in real time and later as an archived webcast on EmergingGrowth.com and the Emerging Growth YouTube channel, expanding access to the company’s latest project information.

To bolster its profile with the investment community, CopAur has retained Montreal-based investor relations firm ImpactDeck for an initial six-month term starting April 1, 2026, at a fee of C$5,000 per month. The engagement is aimed at increasing visibility and engagement with key investors, signalling a more proactive capital markets strategy around the advancement of the Kinsley Mountain project and the company’s broader growth plans in Nevada.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:CPAU) stock is a Hold with a C$0.16 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on CopAur Minerals stock, see the TSE:CPAU Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CPAU Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CPAU is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by poor financial performance (no revenue, sharply widening losses, and continued cash burn), partially offset by a debt-free balance sheet with a sizable equity cushion. Technicals are neutral-to-mildly constructive over longer averages, but valuation is constrained by negative earnings and no dividend yield data.

To see Spark’s full report on CPAU stock, click here.

More about CopAur Minerals

CopAur Minerals Inc. is a mine development company focused on gold projects in Nevada’s emerging, mineral-rich mining regions. data.title: Battery X Metals Advances U.S. IPO Plan With Amended SEC Filing
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Battery X Metals ( (TSE:BATX) ) is now available.

Battery X Metals Inc. has confidentially submitted an amended draft registration statement on Form F-1 to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission, responding to earlier SEC comments on its prior confidential filings. The move advances the company’s plan for an initial public offering of its common shares on a U.S. national securities exchange, though key terms such as share count and price range remain undecided and the deal is still contingent on completion of the SEC review and prevailing market conditions.

The proposed U.S. listing underscores Battery X Metals’ ambition to tap deeper North American capital markets as it develops its battery metals exploration and technology platform. If completed, the IPO could bolster funding for its integrated approach to exploration, battery lifespan extension and recycling, potentially strengthening its competitive position in the fast-evolving battery and critical metals sector.

More about Battery X Metals

Battery X Metals Inc. is a Vancouver-based energy transition resource exploration and technology company focused on domestic battery and critical metal resources. The company pursues a diversified strategy across the battery metals value chain, targeting exploration, lifespan extension and recycling of lithium-ion batteries and related materials.

Average Trading Volume: 11,422

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$10.86M
